vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I spent countless hours sketching in the backyard, which sparked my love for design.

vocab.meaning: vui chơi tự do (không theo quy tắc định sẵn)
vocab.example: I was a huge fan of unstructured play, often wandering into the nearby woods to invent my own imaginary worlds.
Solving intricate jigsaw puzzles provided the intellectual stimulation I craved as a young child.
I decided to commence a hobby in stamp collecting after my grandfather gifted me his old album.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại nỗi nhớ/kỷ niệm xưa
vocab.example: Playing traditional folk games always evokes nostalgia for the simpler times of my childhood.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết xã hội/tập thể
vocab.example: Organizing neighborhood hide-and-seek matches was essential for fostering social cohesion among us kids.
My favorite activity was hands-on exploration in the garden, looking for insects under every rock.
Building elaborate Lego structures was my primary outlet for creative expression when I was about seven.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác với bạn bè đồng lứa
vocab.example: Sports were great, but I mostly enjoyed the peer interaction and the jokes we shared during halftime.
Reading science fiction at a young age had a profound impact on my decision to study engineering later on.
